'''鈭歾h-v-h-p''' ('''kazhavhepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:evanesce|evanesce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-v-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:evanesce|evanesce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-v-h-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazhavhepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhavhepoko|thizhavhepoko]] || [[word:jizhavhepoko|jizhavhepoko]] || [[word:shizhavhepoko|shizhavhepoko]] || [[word:kizhavhepoko|kizhavhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhavhepoko|thuthuzhavhepoko]] || [[word:jujuzhavhepoko|jujuzhavhepoko]] || [[word:shushuzhavhepoko|shushuzhavhepoko]] || [[word:kukuzhavhepoko|kukuzhavhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhavhepoko|thuzhavhepoko]] || [[word:juzhavhepoko|juzhavhepoko]] || [[word:shuzhavhepoko|shuzhavhepoko]] || [[word:kuzhavhepoko|kuzhavhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhavhepoko|thuzhavhepoko]] || [[word:juzhavhepoko|juzhavhepoko]] || [[word:shuzhavhepoko|shuzhavhepoko]] || [[word:kuzhavhepoko|kuzhavhepoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhavhepoko|thothozhavhepoko]] || [[word:jojozhavhepoko|jojozhavhepoko]] || [[word:shoshozhavhepoko|shoshozhavhepoko]] || [[word:kokozhavhepoko|kokozhavhepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhavhepoko|thozhavhepoko]] || [[word:jozhavhepoko|jozhavhepoko]] || [[word:shozhavhepoko|shozhavhepoko]] || [[word:kozhavhepoko|kozhavhepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhavhepoko|thozhavhepoko]] || [[word:jozhavhepoko|jozhavhepoko]] || [[word:shozhavhepoko|shozhavhepoko]] || [[word:kozhavhepoko|kozhavhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zhavhepoko|th忙zhavhepoko]] || [[word:j忙zhavhepoko|j忙zhavhepoko]] || [[word:sh忙zhavhepoko|sh忙zhavhepoko]] || [[word:k忙zhavhepoko|k忙zhavhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhavhepoko|thathazhavhepoko]] || [[word:jajazhavhepoko|jajazhavhepoko]] || [[word:shashazhavhepoko|shashazhavhepoko]] || [[word:kakazhavhepoko|kakazhavhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhavhepoko|thazhavhepoko]] || [[word:jazhavhepoko|jazhavhepoko]] || [[word:shazhavhepoko|shazhavhepoko]] || [[word:kazhavhepoko|kazhavhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhavhepoko|thazhavhepoko]] || [[word:jazhavhepoko|jazhavhepoko]] || [[word:shazhavhepoko|shazhavhepoko]] || [[word:kazhavhepoko|kazhavhepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
